title: Bladee – “Love Is A State” & “Eyelash”
author: Danielle Chelosky

The post Bladee – “Love Is A State” & “Eyelash” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last month, Bladee shared the great track "Magic Misery," and now he's back with more. The Swedish rapper unleashed "Love Is A State" and "Eyelash" today, and he sounds better than ever, self-actualized, almost transcendent. 

After going full evil on 2024's Cold Visions, he's switching gears. "Love Is A State" and "Eyelash" are romantic, or at least as romantic as he can get: "I wanna be in your eye like a eyelash/ I wanna be on your apps like a iPad," he raps over glittery synths, and there's even birds chirping in the background. It's sweet! It's fun! The tunes were made with frequent Drain Gang associates Yung Sherman and Woesum. Listen below.
